'''Shang Lines''' was a localized corporation in the [[Endocray sector/Legends|Endocray sector]]. They specialized in shipping and transportation at the height of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Leona Makk]] was an employee of the company.<ref name="TAS" />

{{Company-stub}}
